text: User reported an email claiming Microsoft 365 password expiry with a suspicious login link
Email from a spoofed HR address asked the employee to verify credentials urgently
Suspicious attachment named invoice.zip was delivered from an unknown external sender
Message contained a fake payroll update link and requested immediate account sign in
Multiple failed login attempts were detected against the Administrator account from one external IP
Repeated authentication failures targeted several usernames within a short time window
Password spraying activity was observed against employee VPN accounts
Numerous unsuccessful sign in attempts were followed by one successful login from the same source
PowerShell executed an encoded command shortly after a Word document was opened
Suspicious executable launched from the Downloads folder and spawned child processes
A macro enabled Office file triggered script execution and network connections to an external host
Endpoint telemetry showed unauthorized binary execution followed by persistence related activity
One source IP scanned multiple internal hosts across common service ports
Sequential connection attempts were made against several systems to identify open services
Network logs showed unusual port enumeration activity from a single device
Host discovery traffic was observed across a large subnet in a short period
Approved vulnerability scanner performed routine checks across internal servers
Help desk technician reset a user password during a scheduled support session
Internal IT team ran a planned network inventory scan during the maintenance window
Employee successfully logged in from the usual office location during business hours
Email pretending to be the finance team requested urgent credential confirmation through an external link
High volume of failed remote logins targeted one privileged account before access succeeded
Script interpreter activity was launched by a document file and contacted a suspicious domain
Firewall logs revealed rapid probing of multiple ports across several hosts from the same source
Authorized administrator accessed servers during the approved maintenance period without suspicious follow on activity
